Need to Get in Touch?

Whether you need support with a personal issue, want to raise a concern, or just have something you’d like to share I would love to hear from you. My team and I are here to help constituents across South East Cornwall, and we aim to respond as quickly as we can.

The reason I stood for election is because I want to help people and to make a real, positive difference to everyday lives.
Often, it’s not the big headlines that matter most, but the quiet support or small changes that can really turn things around for someone. That’s what matters to me.

To get the right help, please include:

  • Your full name

  • Full Address and Postcode (so we can confirm you're a constituent)

  • A brief outline of your issue or enquiry

There are some things MPs can help with and a few things we legally can’t. If you’re not sure, please check the FAQs page for a full guide on what support I can offer and visit Help & Resources to see where else you might be able to get help.

If you’d like to book a surgery appointment, you can do that here.
If your issue is urgent or sensitive, please mention that in your message.

CASEWORK CHAMPION

CASEWORK CHAMPION

A big part of my job happens behind the scenes helping people across South East Cornwall with all sorts of problems: housing, benefits, healthcare, schools and more.

Since being elected, I’ve helped thousands of residents resolve issues, get answers, and access the support they’re entitled to. Some of the most important wins are quiet ones — the kind that make a real difference to someone’s life but never make the headlines.

From July 2024 to July 2025, I have received 17,528 emails on a huge range of topics, with 8,822 casework cases completed.

Local topics that have really affected my constituents have been: 

  • Lack of NHS Dentists 

  • Bus route changes  

  • Threatened closure of Liskeard Post Office 

I have raised all these matters with the relevant ministers and received responses. There are now more than 7000 extra dental appointments offered, with local NHS dentists opening their appointment systems. 

Here’s a snapshot of what my team and I have been working on for you.

Wins for South East Cornwall

Stay in the loop

Sign up with your email address to receive news and updates.

View our privacy policy here

Thank you!

Anna Gelderd MP
South East Cornwall Constituency

House of Commons,
London,
SW1A 0AA

Tel: 07783 636284
